title: trifolium isthmocarpum
intro: Trifolium isthmocarpum, also known as the Isthmus clover, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, and to help with the treatment of kidney stones and urinary tract infections due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium isthmocarpum include its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
